Cross-Reference: Overlap Analysis

🔥 Projects on BOTH Lists (Hype + Money)

Minimal direct overlap — Trendshift is open-source GitHub, TrustMRR is commercial SaaS. One notable connection:

  • Postiz ($97K MRR, 18% growth) — Open-source social media scheduler that appears on TrustMRR AND likely has a GitHub trending presence. Agentic approach to scheduling.

💰 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About (TrustMRR-only)

  1. Stan — $3.57M MRR, zero hype. Self-employment platform quietly dominating.
  2. TrimRx — $314K MRR, 14% growth. GLP-1 telehealth riding the weight-loss wave.
  3. Kibu — $234K MRR. Niche I/DD compliance software with zero tech buzz.
  4. Supliful — $197K MRR. Creator-to-CPG pipeline — underserved market.
  5. Ryze AI — $56K MRR but 166% growth — fastest grower on the list, AI ad management.

🚀 Trending with No Monetization (Trendshift-only opportunities)

  1. DESIGN.md Collection (104k ⭐) — Free design systems for AI. Could be a SaaS marketplace.
  2. AI Opinion Monitor (52.3k ⭐) — Massive repo, monitoring tool. SaaS potential obvious.
  3. Game Dev Studio for Claude (13.5k ⭐) — Agent-driven game dev. Studio-in-a-box SaaS play.
  4. Smart Model Routing (4.9k ⭐) — Cost optimization for AI. Enterprise SaaS obvious.
  5. Screen Recording OSS (9.6k ⭐) — Screen Studio alternative. Pro tier opportunity.

Key Patterns

  1. Claude Code ecosystem is exploding — CLAUDE.md (160k ⭐), Garry Tan setup (78k ⭐), game dev studio, Android RE skill. Anthropic's agent strategy is winning developer mindshare.
  2. AI agent orchestration is THE meta — Multi-agent frameworks, agent skills, agentic social schedlers, AI sales agents. Every layer is being agent-ified.
  3. FOR SALE wave on TrustMRR — Rezi, 1Capture, PROSP, Speel, Polysight, Bookedin all for sale. Founders cashing out mid-growth? Or AI disruption forcing exits?
  4. Health tech quietly printing — TrimRx ($314K), Kibu ($234K), hormone prescribing ($149K). Boring > hype.
  5. SEO is being rebuilt for AI — SEOBOT, AEO Engine, Launch Club all doing "SEO for LLMs" — optimization for ChatGPT/Perplexity answers, not just Google.

Money vs Hype Gap

  • All hype, no money: Claude Code tooling (CLAUDE.md, DESIGN.md, Garry Tan setup) — massive stars, zero MRR. Pure developer enthusiasm.
  • All money, no hype: Stan ($3.57M), TrimRx ($314K), Kibu ($234K) — these don't need GitHub stars.

Opportunities

  1. AI agent marketplace — Everyone's building agents, nobody's selling them. Agent-as-a-service is the next SaaS.
  2. SEO for AI answers — AEO Engine is early. "How do I rank in ChatGPT?" is the new "How do I rank in Google?"
  3. Developer tooling → SaaS pipeline — Take any Trendshift OSS project with 10k+ stars and wrap a pro tier around it.
  4. AI ad management — Ryze AI's 166% growth signals massive demand for autonomous ad optimization.

Quick Takes

  • The Claude Code ecosystem is this quarter's "React in 2015" moment — massive grassroots adoption, gold rush energy, no clear winners yet
  • 6+ startups on TrustMRR are FOR SALE — the indie founder exit market is heating up, likely driven by AI disruption anxiety
  • Smart Model Routing (4.9k ⭐) is the most undervalued project on either list — cost optimization for AI is a billion-dollar category
